calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Approving Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar Apr-16-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Kayla Capitulo appeared via zoom for Thomas Murphy (petitioner).
Diane Lopez appeared via zoom for and with Shane Murphy (objector).

The Court heard no objections to the Petition for Order Approving Settlement Agreement taking the matter under submission with the intent to grant. Petition for Breach of Trust is ordered off calendar.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Not reported.

Petition For Breach Of Trust; For Removal And Appointment Of Trustee; And For Accounting And Information
Off Calendar Apr-15-2025 Off Calendar

Off Calendar Mar-11-2025 Continued To Apr-15-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Approving Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar Mar-11-2025 Continued To Apr-15-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Breach Of Trust; For Removal And Appointment Of Trustee; And For Accounting And Information
Off Calendar Jan-21-2025 Continued To Mar-11-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Breach Of Trust; For Removal And Appointment Of Trustee; And For Accounting And Information
Off Calendar Dec-10-2024 Continued To Jan-21-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Breach Of Trust; For Removal And Appointment Of Trustee; And For Accounting And Information
Off Calendar Aug-27-2024 Continued To Dec-10-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jennifer Herlihy appeared by zoom for and with Quentin Murphy (petitioner) by zoom.
Diana Lopez appeared by zoom for and with Shane Murphy (respondent) by zoom.

Mrs. Lopez stated that the accounting has been provided. Mrs. Herlihy stated that there are a number of issues with the accounting that lends itself to breach of duties issues and that the amounts in dispute are relatively small. The court suggested that the parties work together and select a mediator. Mrs. Lopez stated that she wants to meet and confer with regard to the accounting issues first. Mrs. Herlihy suggested a 90-to-120-day continuance. The Petition for Breach of Trust, etc. is continued to December 10, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The goal is for the parties to meet and confer, and to have mediation completed by December 3, 2024. The parties are to file a joint status report as to the outcome of mediation and any outstanding remaining issues with the accounting.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Nguyen. Not reported.

Petition For Breach Of Trust; For Removal And Appointment Of Trustee; And For Accounting And Information
Off Calendar Jul-09-2024 Continued To Aug-27-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jennifer Herlihy appeared by zoom for and with Quentin Murphy (petitioner) by zoom.
Diana Lopez appeared for and with Shane Murphy (respondent) by zoom.

Mrs. Herlihy stated that it was an error on her part that the request for an accounting was not included in the prayer and that an accounting has not been provided. Mrs. Lopez stated that it was her understanding that her client had provided an accounting to the beneficiaries and noted that her had other counsel. The Petition for Breach of Trust, for Removal and Appointment of Trustee, etc. is continued to August 27, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mrs. Lopez is to provide an accounting to the beneficiaries by August 6, 2024. The court stated that there is no need to file the accounting.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Jones. Not reported.
